.. _proddata:

proddata
========

**inherit_from**: ['identifier']

Summary
-------

+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|keyword             |default             |attribute           |value               |
+====================+====================+====================+====================+
|**collection**      |None                |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*alias*             |dataset             |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*lowercase*         |False               |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*optional*          |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*unique*            |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|**database**        |product             |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*unique*            |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|**date**            |None                |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*optional*          |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*type*              |int                 |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|**domain_name**     |None                |                    |                    |

|                    |                    |                    |fc                  |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|**variable**        |None                |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*optional*          |True                |

+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+

Keywords
--------

collection
^^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |dataset                                          |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

database
^^^^^^^^

default: **product**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

date
^^^^

default: **None**

A list of dates. The convenience function in <semperpy.core.date.Dates> can  generate lists of dates from an interval and an increment

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|type                                             |int                                              |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

domain_name
^^^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

Pre-defined geographical areas or domains: n.europe, sw.europe, n.amer, tropics, global, india, pacific, s.hem, e.trop.pac, n.hem.full, arabia, n.subtropics, austnz, asia, indian, n.pole, s.hem.full, s.subtropics, nw.afr, europe, med, australia, s.hem.mid, s.afr, s.amer.n, newdomain, n.atl, s.amer.s, n.hem, atlantic, n.pac, c.afr, n.hem.mid, e.asia, trop.pac, indonesia, austtrop, trop.atl, se.europe, trop.ind, ind.oc, s.pole, baltic

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |domain                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|validate                                         |ValidateDomains                                  |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |semperpy                                         |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

expver
^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |experiment_id                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |expid                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

level
^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|type                                             |float                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

^^^^^^^

default: **pl**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |leveltype                                        |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

observer
^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |observers                                        |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

source
^^^^^^

default: **oper**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

statistic
^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

the list of statistics to compute or retrieve for the specified set of observations current statistics: product: sum, product: mean, score: rms, score: cor, obsstat: count, obsstat: rms, obsstat: beneficial, obsstat: sum, obsstat: impact_per_anl, obsstat: count_per_anl, obsstat: rate, obsstat: impact_per_ob, obsstat: sumsquare, obsstat: esigb, obsstat: esigo, obsstat: fractional_impact, obsstat: normcost, obsstat: mean

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |stat                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |stats                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |statistics                                       |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

storage
^^^^^^^

default: **dbreader**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

type
^^^^

default: **an**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|validate                                         |ValidateChoice                                   |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |an                                               |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |fc                                               |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

variable
^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
